dsl_rule.translation_notes: Uptrend condition mapped to close > sma_50. Consolidation phase (10+ days range-bound) represented by Donchian Channel upper/lower bounds (dc_upper, dc_lower). Volume dryup (< 50% of 50-day avg) and expansion (> 150% of 50-day avg) both mapped to vol_ratio_20 indicator which captures volume ratio relative to historical average. Entry on close above consolidation high mapped to crosses_above dc_upper. Stop loss set at 2% below consolidation low. Take profit condition (3x risk) requires position tracking not available in indicator set, so only stop loss is coded. Consolidation_min_days parameter noted but not directly enforceable in condition engine.

backtest_rule.reason: Uptrend condition mapped to close > sma_50. Consolidation phase (10+ days range-bound) represented by Donchian Channel upper/lower bounds (dc_upper, dc_lower). Volume dryup (< 50% of 50-day avg) and expansion (> 150% of 50-day avg) both mapped to vol_ratio_20 indicator which captures volume ratio relative to historical average. Entry on close above consolidation high mapped to crosses_above dc_upper. Stop loss set at 2% below consolidation low. Take profit condition (3x risk) requires position tracking not available in indicator set, so only stop loss is coded. Consolidation_min_days parameter noted but not directly enforceable in condition engine.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate a long position when volume expansion follows a consolidation phase in an uptrending stock, as this signals imminent breakout.
